title: Kaizen: an uncontrolled before-after evaluation of short-term clinical outcomes
body: "Kaizen is an HMPPS accredited offending-behaviour programme designed for high and very high-risk men who have been convicted of general violence offences, intimate partner violence offences, and/or sexual offences.  The aim of this study was to determine whether Kaizen completers were making positive progress against key programme aims (for example; problem solving, pro-criminal attitudes) over the duration of participation. "
